hook.summary: Satisfying fruit-merging gameplay with cute character designs.
hook.visual_action: Fruits are dropped into a container, merging into larger ones with popping sound effects.

scene_flow: The container is shown full of colorful, expressive fruit characters.
A fruit is dropped from the top, merging with another to create a larger fruit.
A large green melon is formed, shifting the entire pile.
Gameplay continues with more fruits being dropped into the mix.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game players who enjoy satisfying physics and cute aesthetics.
